data.body: CHECKPOINT 2/6: Read existing test patterns. Tests use tests/lib/assert.sh with assert_eq, _snapshot_fail, assert_pass_if_clean, print_summary. Confirmed: 21 files have DESIGN_NOTES.md refs in plugins/dso/ (RED expected). workflow-config-schema.json line 306 has 'DESIGN_NOTES.md' as default. validate-config.sh exists and supports design.design_notes_path key.
